import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    let part = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(part)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if n > 0
      sum = sum + n * 2
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("result=#{sum}")
  Ok(())
end
